items.title: Strait of Hormuz Is Iran's 'New Nuclear Weapon' Says Miller
items.summary: Aaron David Miller, senior fellow at Carnegie Endowment for International Peace, joined Balance of Power to discuss the recent escalation in the Middle East. He said Iran will go to "extreme lengths" to ensure it exercises some control over the Strait of Hormuz. (Source: Bloomberg)

items.title: Dollar Gets Safe-Haven Flows as US-Iran Ceasefire Under Threat
items.summary: The dollar advanced for a second straight session as escalating fears of a return to full-scale war between the US and Iran prompted investors to seek shelter.

items.title: Is Iran deal  over  and war back on ? A timeline of conflict and talks
Trump Threatens More Iran Strikes
items.summary: Leslie Vinjamuri, the President and CEO of the Chicago Council on Global Affairs joined Bloomberg Open Interest to explain why President Trump's latest Iran threats are aimed at gaining negotiating leverage rather than launching a full-scale war. She also breaks down NATO's strategy for managing Trump, why Europe is adapting its approach, and why the risk of escalation. and its impact on oil marke

items.title: Security Council LIVE: Open debate on sexual violence in conflict
items.summary: The UN Security Council is holding an open debate Tuesday honouring the promise of international law to survivors of sexual violence in conflict as more reports emerge about warring parties using rape as a weapon, actions that constitute war crimes. Stay tuned for live updates from our meetings coverage team.
